articles.title: SpaceX officially prices shares at $135 in the largest IPO ever
articles.description: Wits its official share pricing announcement, SpaceX's IPO has begun.

articles.title: Oracle warns of security bug that hackers abused to breach 100+ companies
articles.description: The tech giant warned of a security flaw that a cybercrime gang said it's exploiting as part of a mass-hacking campaign. Google said it notified more than 100 organizations that had potentially vulnerable servers.

articles.title: SpaceX SPV investors won’t know their true holdings until post-IPO lock-ups lift
articles.description: After SpaceX makes its public debut, lower-tier SPV investors face hidden fees, lengthy payout delays, and the risk of outright fraud.

articles.title: Bluesky launches group chats, as company shifts focus to community features
articles.description: Bluesky's latest feature is group chats, arriving amid a shift in focus on building features for smaller communities.

articles.description: By integrating an AI assistant directly into Edits, Meta is aiming to keep creators engaged on Instagram as it continues to compete with TikTok and YouTube for creators' attention.

articles.title: Deezer’s new tool can identify AI music from Spotify, Apple Music, and others

articles.title: These are the countries moving to ban social media for children
articles.description: Australia was the first country to issue a ban in late 2025, aiming to reduce the pressures and risks that young users may face on social media, including cyberbullying, social media addiction, and exposure to predators.

articles.title: Waymo launches a loyalty program with 10% cash back and free cancellations

articles.title: DoorDash’s new AI chatbot lets you order with prompts and photos

articles.title: xAI fired an engineer who raised alarms about Grok safety, new lawsuit claims
articles.description: A former xAI engineer is suing the company and SpaceX, alleging he was fired for raising AI safety concerns about Grok days before SpaceX's historic IPO.

articles.title: Why Andrew Yang is building instead of waiting for Washington
articles.description: Andrew Yang’s 2020 presidential campaign was based on a warning that automation and AI would hollow out the labor market and concentrate wealth in the hands of a few. At the time, ideas like Universal Basic Income felt fringe. Now Dario Amodei, Sam Altman, and Bernie Sanders are all saying versions of the same thing.  An entrepreneur at heart, […]

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. SpaceX以每股135美元正式定价进行史上最大规模IPO，但SPV投资者在锁定期结束前无法知晓真实持股情况，同时量子太空公司试图借其IPO浪潮推动军事SPAC上市。
2. Oracle披露被黑客利用的安全漏洞已导致超过100家企业遭入侵，凸显企业软件供应链风险。
3. 社交平台动态：Bluesky推出群聊功能转向社区化，Meta的Edits应用将加入AI助手及桌面版，多国正推进禁止儿童使用社交媒体的立法。
4. AI应用加速落地：DoorDash推出支持语音和图片下单的AI聊天机器人，Deezer发布可识别Spotify、Apple Music等平台AI生成音乐的工具，Coinbase新工具帮助用户交易并支付高级研究费用。
5. 其他重要动态：Waymo推出含10%返现和免费取消的忠诚度计划，微软与Alt Carbon合作强化印度碳移除布局，韩国因数据泄露对Coupang处以超4亿美元罚款，Endurance Energy融资5400万美元开发新型能源。

今日最值得关注的是：SpaceX以史上最大IPO定价上市，叠加Oracle重大安全漏洞与多国社交平台监管收紧，科技行业正迎来资本、安全与合规的多重变局。

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **PyTorch性能优化与模型压缩**：Hugging Face发布PyTorch剖析系列第二部分，聚焦从标准线性层到融合MLP的优化技术，提升深度学习模型效率。
2. **开发者工具与模型部署**：Cohere推出专为开发者设计的“North Mini Code”模型；Hugging Face提供GitHub CI迁移至其作业平台的方案，并展示通过链式调用两个Spaces构建3D巴黎画廊的Agent应用。
3. **开源社区与强化学习**：开源社区支持用于智能体强化学习（Agentic RL）的OpenEnv框架；Hugging Face新增弗吉尼亚州社区投资，推动本地就业与能源可负担性。
4. **AI行业并购与生态合作**：OpenAI宣布收购Ona公司；BBVA银行将AI嵌入核心业务并与OpenAI合作；LSEG、Nextdoor等企业通过Codex模型加速决策与开发。
5. **AI监管与安全议题**：OpenAI支持欧洲构建可信AI生态系统，并揭露与PRC相关的虚假信息行动试图影响美国AI辩论；Google公布2026年5月AI新闻合集。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：OpenAI收购Ona并深化企业合作（如BBVA、Oracle），标志着AI从工具向核心业务基础设施的加速渗透，同时开源社区与监管动态凸显技术落地的双轨博弈。

articles.title: Chinese expert criticizes Filipino FM's claim that Japan-Philippines delimitation 'nothing to do' with China, warns move serves ulterior purposes beyond bilateral talks

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. [重点] 中国专家批评菲律宾外长关于“日菲海洋划界与中国无关”的言论，指出此举暗藏超出双边对话范围的别有用心。
2. [重点] 专家警告称，日菲海洋划界行动可能服务于更广泛的战略意图，对中国在南海的合法权益构成潜在影响。
3. [重点] 中方重申对相关海域的主权立场，强调任何涉及地区海洋秩序的协商不应排除中国。

今日最值得关注的发展是：中国专家明确驳斥菲方“海洋划界无关中国”论调，并揭露其背后可能存在的战略意图。
